source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Playfair Display for plume-like editorial headings, Inter for product UI, and Noto Serif JP / Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels.
layout: Airy 8px grids, fine black-leg dividers, feather-soft surface layers, compact dashboard panels, and calm tidal spacing for dense product interfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Egret motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Egret transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated egret plume motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: an elegant white egret plume cluster with a partial slender black leg silhouette as a graphic counterform, accurate feather barbs, soft white layered plumes, pale warm highlights, subtle tidal-marsh green reflected tones, crisp outer silhouette, minimal editorial elegance.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; vertical plume sweep with the black leg as a thin contrasting stem; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves white feather texture, black leg contrast, and refined marsh-neutral color.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full bird body, no landscape, no water, no reeds as props, no text, no watermark, no second subject, no logo, no random brand marks.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Egret" / "Egret Plume", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Use a minimal editorial system derived from a white egret plume with a slender black leg counterform, tidal marsh greens, reed taupes, shell whites, wet-silt neutrals, and quiet waterline accents. Include large readable sections for title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, navigation, dashboard charts, data table, form controls, search/command, status states, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples. Use shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, precise editorial grid, 8px radius cards, black hairline dividers, feather-white surfaces, marsh green primary actions, silt-neutral secondary controls, pale shell panels, reed-taupe borders, and subtle plume texture strips. Avoid fake brand names, watermark, lorem ipsum blocks, tiny illegible token tables, purple/blue gradients, neon, unrelated saturated colors, and random logos.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt: Create one exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Egret" / "Egret Plume", translated from the light board and the same white plume plus black leg motif. Use deep ink-black and wet-silt backgrounds, feather-white foreground text, shell-white cards in restrained contrast, marsh green primary actions, tidal sage accents, reed taupe borders, moonlit plume texture, hairline black-leg dividers, and calm editorial spacing. Include large readable sections for title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, navigation, dashboard charts, data table, form controls, search/command, status states, cards, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switch, tabs, badges, alert, empty/loading/error states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and CSS token samples. Preserve the light board's component language and shadcn/tweakcn compatibility. Avoid neon, unrelated saturated colors, purple/blue gradients, flat pure black except as accent, fake brands, watermark, and random logos.
